notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Andruw Monasterio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio grounds into a double play, shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Andruw Monasterio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin singles on a line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas. Carlos Narváez scores. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd. Fielding error by center fielder Lane Thomas.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida doubles (5) on a fly ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin GIDP

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Mickey Gasper pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Nick Sogard out at home on the throw, right fielder Jac Caglianone to catcher Carter Jensen. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida grounds out, second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
